meta.model: hierarchical partial pooling (product x region), PyMC NUTS
meta.note_threshold_scale_mismatch: Minimum Stock Threshold in the source data averages about 56 units (range 10-99) and does not scale with actual demand, which averages about 248 units per transaction (range 1-960). That mismatch is itself a finding: the current policy applies roughly the same buffer regardless of how much a segment actually sells.
